---
name: create-instructions
description: Describe when to use this prompt
agent: Instructions Generator
---
Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise an appropriate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are clear, concise, and actionable, providing step-by-step guidance for the intended task or question. Use the tools at your disposal to research, gather information, and edit the instruction file as needed to ensure it is accurate and comprehensive. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file with a link to the new instruction file and a brief description of its purpose. If no information is provieded below prompot the user for the necessary details bout the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
